QUAL_COMP_TIER_POST_IR Quality Composite Tier (post-IR) Quality Composite Tier indicator after Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Quality Composite Tier is applied to practices with Quality Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean. 31 Num 8 1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS
